name: codex-memory
description: Full Codex memory enhancement bundle. Adds structured ad-hoc capture plus a retrieval MCP toolkit over the stock memories workspace.

interface.shortDescription: Full capture and retrieval tooling for Codex memory.
interface.longDescription: Adds two layers on top of stock Codex memory without modifying codex-rs: a capture skill that writes structured ad-hoc notes to ~/.codex/memories/extensions/ad_hoc/notes/, and a retrieval MCP sidecar that exposes project summary, general search, related-file lookup, recent-decision lookup, note reading, and workspace status tools over the existing memories workspace. The stock Phase 2 consolidation pipeline still owns durable MEMORY.md and memory_summary.md updates; this plugin enhances capture and retrieval around that pipeline rather than replacing it.
defaultPrompt: Finish this task, capture the root cause, and use memory retrieval when prior context may help.
Fix this bug, save a structured ad-hoc memory note, and search related files and past decisions in memory.
